caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses stands against a plain black background, speaking and gesturing with her hands. She wears a light green tunic with red and white floral embroidery along the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to her collar. In the bottom left corner of each scene, there is a circular logo featuring a golden wheel design and the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman continues to speak, shifting her facial expressions and moving her hands to emphasize her points. Initially, her hands are slightly raised and open; by the end, she moves her right hand across her chest while her left hand remains lowered. The lighting remains constant, focusing on the woman while the background remains dark and void of any other objects or people.
